title: Portuguese Tortilla Wrap
description: A classic Portuguese dish, this tortilla wrap fills a smooth and silky omelette with the flavors of Portugal.
instructions: Beat the eggs in a bowl and season with salt, black pepper, and chili flakes.
Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the beaten eggs and cook until the edges start to set.
Place the portuguese tortilla on top and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Use a spatula to carefully fold the tortilla in half.
Warm the wrap in the microwave for 10-15 seconds.
Assemble the wrap by placing the tortilla omelette inside.
Add shredded cheese on top (if using).
